flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Blue Mountain Community College fell 42% between 2006 and 2009 (20.3% → 11.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Blue Mountain Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Blue Mountain Community College fell 22% between 2017 and 2020 ($15.3k → $12.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Blue Mountain Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (46.2% → 51.4%).
